notes: Spec asserts the auto-executed tool-call arc: ready → working → ready with a tool call mid-turn, and the invariant that state NEVER enters waiting. The recipe drives a single auto-approved shell call ('echo hello') under `kiro-cli chat --trust-all-tools` followed by a terminal text-only reply. --trust-all-tools means no approval picker, so PermissionPending is never set and waiting is unreachable; if the recording ever flips to waiting, the tool tripped a gate (different feature: tool-gate) and the recipe must be tightened. The tool call itself is observable in transcript.jsonl as the mid-turn AssistantMessage toolUse block ('shell' / echo hello) closed by a ToolResults line (kirocli/parser.go: AssistantMessage with toolUse → assistant+ToolUses opens the tool; ToolResults closes via ToolResultIDs); the phase DSL has no tool-event form — the daemon's events.jsonl carries NO 'tool_use' event kind (tool spans live inside the working span, not as distinct daemon events), so the auto-executed tool call is asserted via the single uninterrupted working span it sustains plus the no-waiting invariant, not a dedicated phase (same convention as the codex/pi/opencode/aider siblings; the live recording 2026-06-05-01-58-42 confirmed no tool_use kind is emitted). No model/cost/token assertions: the kiro-cli JSONL carries no model/token/cost (the sidecar holds credits/model, the daemon does not read it), so the live recording records an EMPTY model and cost/tokens false — the model key is omitted (asserting the literal 'unknown' fails against the empty recorded value; matches the recorded session-start/basic-turn siblings) — orthogonal to this state+tool-call scenario.

text: Session appears in ready (kiro mints the UUID session directly in ready; the .jsonl is written lazily on the first prompt)
User prompt requiring a tool call drives ready → working (the auto-executed shell call runs inside this span)
Turn completes back to ready at the final text-only AssistantMessage; the shell tool ran auto-approved (--trust-all-tools) inside the working span and state never entered waiting
